title: Sweet Raspberry Chinese Pancake
description: A light and sweet dessert dish featuring raspberry jam as a temper in an unconventional pancake base that is both savory and slightly fruity.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together flour and water until it forms a smooth batter.
Add rice vinegar, sesame oil, sugar, ground cinnamon, and vanilla extract (if using) to the flour mixture. Stir well until fully combined.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium-high heat. Once hot, add 1 tablespoon of cooking spray or a small amount of butter for each pancake you wish to make.
Once heated, pour about 1/4 cup of batter onto the pan and spread evenly with a spatula. Cook until bubbles appear on top and edges start to dry out (about 2-3 minutes).
Remove from heat and fold in half, then spoon a tablespoon of raspberry jam over each pancake.
Serve warm or at room temperature as desired.
